Afridialect.ai

A web platform for creating and purchasing high-quality speech datasets in African local dialects

✅ Next.js 16.1.6

✅ React 19.0.0

✅ TypeScript 5.6.3

✅ Tailwind CSS 3.4.15

Afridialect.ai

High-quality speech datasets for African local dialects
